selections.name: C Mcgriff
selections.reason: Boasts the highest overall speed figure (105) and class rating (109) in the field. Tyler Gaffalione takes the mount, and the tactical speed fits perfectly here.

selections.name: Gethsemane
selections.reason: Strong class rating of 109 and consistent speed figures. Luis Saez aboard signals intent, and should get a favorable stalking trip.

selections.name: Paul's Recovery
selections.reason: Presents a solid 104 speed figure and 102 class rating. Emmanuel Esquivel can work out a mid-pack trip to close late.

selections.name: Garryowen
selections.reason: Class rating of 105 suggests back class, though recent form is slightly off the top contenders. Capable of hitting the board.

danger_horse.name: Bhatia
danger_horse.reason: Draws the rail and has a class rating of 100. Could dictate terms early if uncontested.

selections.name: Elida's Angel (ire)
selections.reason: Raw speed figure of 116 is capped due to class disparity logic, but still stands out as the dominant force in this marathon turf event.

selections.name: Eenymeanymightymo
selections.reason: Speed figure of 111 with a 100 class rating. Proven stamina and should appreciate the 1 1/2 mile distance over the firm going.

selections.name: Don't Look Now
selections.reason: Class rating of 106 and speed of 108. The inside draw saves critical ground on the sharp Churchill turf turns.

selections.name: Mass
selections.reason: Solid 105 speed figure and 101 class. Has tactical versatility to sit mid-pack and make a sustained run.

danger_horse.name: Pretty Tapit
danger_horse.reason: Class rating of 104 and gets Luis Saez. Dangerous if allowed to dictate a slow pace.

selections.name: I Had That One Too
selections.reason: Class rating of 107 tops the field. Drops into a favorable spot and has the late pace figures to capitalize on the long Churchill stretch.

selections.name: Big Dig
selections.reason: Speed figure of 106 is the highest in the race. Will be prominent early and is the clear pace threat.

selections.name: Little Dixie
selections.reason: Speed figure of 98. Gets a favorable inside draw and can save ground before making a late bid.

selections.name: Tortuga Island
selections.reason: Class rating of 93. Rail draw provides a ground-saving trip, making her a logical underneath candidate.

danger_horse.name: Cora's Legacy
danger_horse.reason: Speed figure of 98 shows she can compete on her best day, though consistency is a question.

selections.name: Good Mojo
selections.reason: Dominant 108 speed figure and 104 class rating. The rail draw in a 6-furlong sprint is highly advantageous for this profile.

selections.name: Hesper
selections.reason: Speed figure of 104 and class of 101. Tyler Gaffalione rides, ensuring a perfectly timed stalking trip.

selections.name: Pop Paul
selections.reason: Speed figure of 103. Should get a great tracking trip behind the early speed.

selections.name: Southern Bullet
selections.reason: Speed figure of 100. Outside draw keeps him out of trouble and allows for a clean late run.

danger_horse.name: Gray Is Okay
danger_horse.reason: Speed figure of 97. Capable of picking up the pieces if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Lunar Loop
selections.reason: Massive class drop (Class rating 114). Figures to completely outclass this field if she runs to her baseline.

selections.name: Noroomformischief
selections.reason: Class rating of 110 indicates significant back class. Inside draw is beneficial for the 7-furlong chute.

selections.name: Market Strategy
selections.reason: Speed figure of 99. Brian Hernandez Jr. is a positive jockey upgrade for this mid-pack runner.

selections.name: In For A Spin
selections.reason: Class rating of 102. Consistent enough to hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Red Raze
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and a 102 class rating make her a threat to steal it on the front end.

selections.name: Mumdoggie
selections.reason: Speed figure of 107 and class of 110. Luis Saez takes the mount, signaling readiness for a peak effort.

selections.name: The Standard
selections.reason: Speed figure of 107 and class of 109. Drawn well to stalk the pace and pounce in the long stretch.

selections.name: Chianti Town
selections.reason: Raw speed of 109 is capped by class disparity (95), but still remains a potent late threat.

selections.name: Eleos
selections.reason: Class rating of 104. Consistent runner who should be in the mix late.

danger_horse.name: Armet
danger_horse.reason: Speed figure of 104. Can show early foot and hang around for a minor award.

selections.name: Nobals
selections.reason: Elite turf sprinter with a 121 speed figure and 115 class. Proven graded stakes winner who towers over this field.

selections.name: Dhabab (ire)
selections.reason: Speed figure of 120 and class of 113. Tyler Gaffalione rides, making him the clear danger to the top pick.

selections.name: Script
selections.reason: Class rating of 115 and speed of 114. Will be flying late if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Heart Headed
selections.reason: Speed figure of 118, though class is slightly lower at 106. Capable of outrunning his odds.

danger_horse.name: Tejano Twist
danger_horse.reason: Speed figure of 114 and class of 111. Rail draw in a turf sprint is highly advantageous.

selections.name: Classic Glide
selections.reason: Class rating of 108 and speed of 104. Tyler Gaffalione aboard gives this filly a tactical edge in a competitive field.

selections.name: Call Me Precious
selections.reason: Speed figure of 105 and class of 104. The rail draw is perfect for her running style.

selections.name: Killa Sally
selections.reason: Class rating of 105. Outside draw keeps her clear of trouble for a late sustained run.

selections.name: Speed Skater
selections.reason: Class rating of 104. Consistent performer who should get a good stalking trip.

danger_horse.name: Spitfire
danger_horse.reason: Class rating of 111 indicates massive back class, making her a dangerous overlay if she returns to form.

selections.name: Les Is Best
selections.reason: Speed figure of 109 and class of 105. Brian Hernandez Jr. rides, and the inside draw is ideal for this turf route.

selections.name: Heartbeat
selections.reason: Class rating of 106 and speed of 104. Luis Saez takes the mount, ensuring a perfectly timed ride.

selections.name: Malibu Smart
selections.reason: Speed figure of 106. Florent Geroux is a master on the turf and will have her positioned well.

selections.name: Ocean Ripple
selections.reason: Speed figure of 110 is capped by a 98 class rating, but still possesses the raw talent to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Evelyn Louise
danger_horse.reason: Speed figure of 104 and class of 100. Inside draw saves ground, making her a live longshot underneath.
